title: Edusky Private School | Small by Design. Big on Heart.

hero.badge: Johor Bahru · Est. 2014 · Better One's Life
hero.description: An intentional micro-school where every child is known by name — not by roll number.

philosophy.label: Our Philosophy
philosophy.title: We are small because we choose to be
philosophy.subtitle: Globally, the micro-school movement is growing. Parents are seeking intimate learning communities — places where relationships matter more than rankings.

cards.title: Every Child Known
cards.text: No child falls through the cracks. Our teachers know each student's strengths, challenges, interests, and learning style — personally, not from a file.

cards.title: Individual Attention
cards.text: Every child develops at their own pace. Our small classes give teachers the time to understand each student personally — their strengths, their challenges, and what makes them light up.

cards.title: Community-Embedded
cards.text: CSR projects, parent workshops, expert talks, student volunteering — a mega-school runs events. A micro-school builds community.

programmes.label: Programmes
programmes.title: More than one classroom
programmes.subtitle: Edusky operates multiple service lines under one roof. Every programme feeds into every other — a complete education ecosystem.

items.title: Primary School (Std 1–6)
items.description: KSSR national curriculum with English emphasis. Small classes, personalised attention, holistic development.

items.title: Tuition & Enrichment
items.description: After-school tuition, homework support, and enrichment programmes. Holiday camps, creative arts — open to Edusky and non-Edusky students.

cta.label: 2026 Enrollment
cta.title: Your child deserves to be known, not counted
cta.subtitle: Come visit us. Meet our teachers. Sit in a class. See what small feels like.
